§lSummoning Scroll of Iron Golem§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lCraftable on§r: Magic Spells Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lDispensable§r: YES
•§lOffhand equippable§r: YES
•§lCastable with§r: Wands

•§lImpact Hit Damage§r: 2
•§lImpact Area Damage§r: 0
•§lImpact Result§r: Summons an Iron Golem on impact.
